1.tip: 30° incline. Control descent. Elbows 45° from torso.

2.tip: 30° incline. Control descent. Elbows 45°. Straight to A2.

3.tip: 30° incline. Control descent. Elbows 45°. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heaviest pressing of your programme. Control descent fully. This is your strength benchmark.

shoulder.name: Low Incline DB Press
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: 15° max incline. Neutral grip preferred. Avoid full lockout.

1.tip: Full ROM. Elbows 45° from torso. Touch chest lightly.

2.tip: Full ROM. Elbows 45°. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Full ROM. Elbows 45°. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Full ROM. Elbows 45° from torso.

shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Neutral grip DBs only. 45° elbow angle strictly enforced.

1.tip: Lead with elbow, not wrist. Shoulder height only. Slow controlled return.

2.tip: Lead with elbow. Shoulder height only. Rest 40s after A3.

3.tip: Lead with elbow. Shoulder height only. Rest 60s after A3.

maintenance.tip: Strict form. Shoulder height only.

shoulder.name: Face Pull
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Face pulls for rotator cuff health. Rope attachment. Pull to forehead, elbows high.

1.tip: Keep upper arms still. Full stretch at the bottom. Controlled return.

2.tip: Keep upper arms still. Full stretch. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Keep upper arms still. Full stretch. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Upper arms fixed. Controlled stretch.

elbow.name: Cable Pushdown (Rope)
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Rope pushdown, neutral grip. Avoid overhead extension.

1.tip: Slight forward lean for chest emphasis. Full depth. Control the descent.

2.tip: Slight forward lean. Full depth. Straight to C2.

3.tip: Slight forward lean. Full depth. Straight to C2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy weighted. Full depth. 3-4 min rest.

shoulder.name: Machine Chest Press
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Machine chest press instead of dips. Full ROM, squeeze at top.

elbow.name: Machine Chest Press
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Machine chest press. Avoid full lockout.

1.tip: Controlled squeeze at peak. Don't let arms go too far back.

2.tip: Squeeze at peak. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Squeeze at peak. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Full ROM. Squeeze at the peak.

shoulder.name: Cable Crossover (Low-to-High)
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Low-to-high cable crossover. Arms stay below shoulder height.

1.tip: Hinge at hips, back flat. Pull bar to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades.

2.tip: Back flat. Pull to lower chest. Squeeze. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Back flat. Pull to lower chest. Squeeze. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Back flat. Squeeze shoulder blades at the top. 3-4 min rest.

lowerBack.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Chest-supported row removes spinal loading. Full ROM, squeeze.

1.tip: Lean slightly back. Pull to upper chest. Elbows drive down and back.

2.tip: Lean slightly back. Pull to chest. Elbows down. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Lean slightly back. Pull to chest. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full stretch at top. Pull elbows down and back.

shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Wider grip only. Avoid behind-neck. Pull to upper chest only.

1.tip: Sit tall. Pull handle to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades. Slow return.

2.tip: Sit tall. Squeeze blades. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Sit tall. Squeeze blades. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full scapular retraction at top.

lowerBack.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Use chest-supported row to remove spinal loading.

1.tip: Hinge forward. Arms slightly bent. Lead with elbows. Shoulder height max.

2.tip: Hinge forward. Shoulder height max. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Hinge forward. Shoulder height max. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Rear delts only. Don't let traps take over.

1.tip: Elbows pinned at sides. Full ROM. No swinging.

2.tip: Elbows fixed. No swing. Straight to C2.

3.tip: Elbows fixed. No swing. Straight to C2.

maintenance.tip: Strict form. Elbows pinned. Heavy.

elbow.name: Hammer Curl
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Hammer curl — neutral grip reduces elbow joint stress.

1.tip: Landmine attachment. Stand perpendicular. Elbow drives back and up. Full stretch.

2.tip: Elbow back and up. Full stretch. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Elbow back and up. Full stretch. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full ROM. Elbow drives high.

lowerBack.name: Chest-Supported DB Row
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Chest-supported removes spinal loading.

1.tip: Bar on traps. Hip-width stance. Knees tracking toes. Depth to parallel or below.

2.tip: Depth to parallel. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Paused at depth for 1 second. Drive through heels. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heaviest squat. Full depth. 3-4 min rest. This is your strength benchmark.

knee.name: Goblet Squat
knee.tip: KNEE ADAPTED: Goblet squat — limited ROM, heels elevated. No pain at depth.

lowerBack.name: Goblet Squat
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Goblet squat keeps torso upright, reducing spinal load.

hip.name: Goblet Squat
hip.tip: HIP ADAPTED: Goblet squat — controlled depth, heels elevated.

1.tip: Feet hip-width. Don't lock knees. Full ROM. Feet mid-platform.

2.tip: Full ROM. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Full ROM. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full ROM. Don't lock out.

knee.name: Leg Press (Partial ROM)
knee.tip: KNEE ADAPTED: Feet HIGH on plate. 60° max depth. Do not go deeper. No full lockout.

1.tip: Hinge at hips. Bar close to legs. Feel hamstring stretch. Stop before rounding.

2.tip: Hinge at hips. Hamstring stretch. Straight to A2.

3.tip: 1s pause at bottom. Hinge at hips. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Controlled descent. Hamstring stretch. 3-4 min rest.

hamstring.name: Leg Curl
hamstring.tip: HAMSTRING ADAPTED: Seated leg curl — no hip hinge loading on the hamstring.

lowerBack.name: Cable Pull-Through
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Cable pull-through — hip hinge pattern without spinal compression.

1.tip: Full ROM. Squeeze at peak. Slow return. Lying or seated both fine.

2.tip: Squeeze at peak. Slow return. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Squeeze at peak. Slow return. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Full ROM. 1s hold at peak.

1.tip: Full stretch at bottom, full contraction at top. 1s hold at top.

2.tip: Full stretch and contraction. Straight to C2.

3.tip: Full stretch and contraction. Straight to C2.

maintenance.tip: Slow and heavy. Full ROM.

ankle.name: Seated Calf Raise
ankle.tip: ANKLE ADAPTED: Seated calf raise only. No standing loading.

1.tip: Partner holds ankles. Lower as slowly as possible. Push up with hands. Elite hamstring builder.

2.tip: Lower slow. Straight to C2.

3.tip: Lower as slowly as possible. Straight to C2.

maintenance.tip: Max eccentric control. Lower over 5s.

hamstring.name: Leg Curl
hamstring.tip: HAMSTRING ADAPTED: Standard leg curl instead of Nordic. No aggressive eccentric.

1.tip: Seated or standing. Elbows 90° at bottom. Full lockout.

2.tip: Full lockout. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Seated, neutral grip preferred.

shoulder.name: Arnold Press
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Arnold press — rotating motion reduces impingement risk.

1.tip: Lead with elbows. Shoulder height only. Slight forward lean.

2.tip: Lead with elbows. Shoulder height. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Lead with elbows. Shoulder height. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Strict form. No momentum.

shoulder.name: Cable Y-Raise
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Cable Y-raise at low pulley — lower impingement risk.

1.tip: Rope attachment. Pull to forehead. Elbows high. Squeeze rear delts. Rotator cuff health essential.

2.tip: Pull to forehead. Elbows high. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Pull to forehead. Elbows high. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Rope to forehead. Elbows high. Mandatory for shoulder health.

1.tip: Elbows pinned to sides. Full ROM. No swinging.

2.tip: Elbows fixed. No swing. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Elbows fixed. Full ROM. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Strict. Heavy. Elbows fixed.

elbow.name: Hammer Curl
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Neutral grip hammer curl reduces joint stress.

1.tip: Lower bar to forehead. Elbows stay fixed pointing up. Full stretch.

2.tip: Lower to forehead. Elbows fixed. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Full stretch. Elbows fixed. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Full stretch. No elbow flare.

elbow.name: Cable Pushdown (Straight Bar)
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Pushdown only — skull crushers place too much stress on inflamed elbow.

1.tip: Neutral grip. Elbows pinned. Works brachialis and brachioradialis.

2.tip: Neutral grip. Elbows fixed. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Neutral grip. Elbows fixed. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Strict neutral grip. Hold at top.

1.tip: Stand inside the bar. Hip-width feet. Neutral spine. Push floor away.

2.tip: Neutral spine. Push floor away. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Heavy. Neutral spine. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heaviest full-body pull. 3-4 min rest.

lowerBack.name: Goblet Squat
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Goblet squat instead. Upright torso removes spinal compression.

1.tip: Hip hinge, not a squat. Drive hips forward explosively. Bell reaches shoulder height.

2.tip: Explosive hip drive. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Explosive hip drive. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy bell. Explosive. Full hip extension at top.

lowerBack.name: DB Goblet Squat
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Goblet squat — no ballistic hip hinge loading.

maintenance.tip: Heaviest pressing of your programme. Control descent fully. This is your strength benchmark.

shoulder.name: Machine Chest Press
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Machine chest press. Full ROM, squeeze at peak.

maintenance.tip: Full ROM. Elbows 45° from torso.
Seated, neutral grip. Heavy.

shoulder.name: Cable Lateral Raise
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Strict form, shoulder height only.

maintenance.tip: Heavy weighted. Slight forward lean. Full depth. 3-4 min rest.

shoulder.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Close grip bench press for tricep focus.

maintenance.tip: Strict form. Shoulder height only. No momentum.
Back flat. Pull to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades. This is your heaviest row.
Add weight via belt. Full ROM. Pause at top. 3-4 min rest.

shoulder.name: Lat Pulldown
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Lat pulldown — grip width adjusted for comfort.

maintenance.tip: EZ bar reduces wrist stress. Strict form. Elbows fixed.

elbow.name: Hammer Curl
elbow.tip: ELBOW ADAPTED: Neutral grip hammer curl.

maintenance.tip: Mandatory for shoulder health in maintenance phase. Rope to forehead. Elbows high.
Heaviest squat. Full depth. Belt optional. 4-5 min rest. This is your primary strength benchmark.

knee.name: Leg Press (Heavy)
knee.tip: KNEE ADAPTED: Heavy leg press. High foot position, 60° max ROM.

lowerBack.name: Goblet Squat
lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Heavy goblet squat. Upright torso.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Deep stretch. 3-4 min rest.

hamstring.name: Leg Curl
hamstring.tip: HAMSTRING ADAPTED: Seated leg curl only.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full ROM. Feet mid-plate.

knee.name: Leg Press (Partial ROM)
knee.tip: KNEE ADAPTED: High foot position. 60° max. Do not go past parallel.

maintenance.tip: Full stretch. Full contraction. 1s hold at top. Heavy.

1.tip: Hands shoulder-width. Elbows 45°. Full ROM. Core tight.

2.tip: Elbows 45°. Full ROM. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Controlled descent 3s. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Add weight plate on back if too easy.

shoulder.name: Incline Push-Up
shoulder.tip: SHOULDER ADAPTED: Incline push-up reduces shoulder angle. Hands on a table or chair.

1.tip: Elbows stop at floor. Full press. Limits ROM — safer for shoulders.

2.tip: Elbows stop at floor. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Controlled descent. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy dumbbells. Full press from floor.

1.tip: Brace on bench or knee. Back flat. Pull elbow back. Squeeze.

2.tip: Back flat. Pull elbow back. Straight to A2.

3.tip: Pull elbow back and up. Straight to A2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy. Full scapular retraction.

lowerBack.tip: LOWER BACK ADAPTED: Use the supported version — brace on a surface so the back is fully supported.

1.tip: Hold DB at chest. Upright torso. Depth to parallel. Elbows inside knees at bottom.

2.tip: Upright torso. Depth to parallel. Straight to B2.

3.tip: Pause 1s at depth. Upright torso. Straight to B2.

maintenance.tip: Heavy DB. Pause at depth.

knee.tip: KNEE ADAPTED: Heels elevated on a plate/book. Depth reduced — stop before discomfort.
